description_blurb:
This document is a Mission Report (MISREP), a standardized reporting form the U.S. Military uses to record the circumstances surrounding its operations. U.S. military services often use MISREPs to report Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAP) to AARO. The GENTEXT, or “general text” section of these reports often contains important qualitative, contextual information, distinguishing it from the more quantitative, or numerical, data found elsewhere in the report.
A U.S. military operator reported observing a “misshapen and uneven ball of white light,” describing multiple “glares or light” emanating from an “unknown origin.” The reporter described the UAP as a “light/glare halo effect” at the top of the Full-Motion Video (FMV) feed.
All descriptive and estimative language contained in this report reflects the reporter’s subjective interpretation at the time of the event. Such characterizations should not be interpreted as a conclusive indication of the presence or absence of any intrinsic object features or performance characteristics.
title: DOW-UAP-D32, Mission Report, Syria, October 2024
summary:
This document is a Mission Report (MISREP), a standardized reporting form the U.S. Military uses to record the circumstances surrounding its operations. U.S. military services often use MISREPs to report Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAP) to AARO. The GENTEXT, or “general text” section of these reports often contains important qualitative, contextual information, distinguishing it from the more quantitative, or numerical, data found elsewhere in the report.
A U.S. military operator reported observing a “misshapen and uneven ball of white light,” describing multiple “glares or light” emanating from an “unknown origin.” The reporter described the UAP as a “light/glare halo effect” at the top of the Full-Motion Video (FMV) feed.
All descriptive and estimative language contained in this report reflects the reporter’s subjective interpretation at the time of the event. Such characterizations should not be interpreted as a conclusive indication of the presence or absence of any intrinsic object features or performance characteristics.
bust_reasoning: The document provides a detailed description of the UAP that is highly consistent with an optical artifact or camera anomaly. The observation is limited to a single sensor (FMV), lacks corroborating data from other sensors, and reports no anomalous kinematics or behavior. The aircrew's assessment that it was 'not a lasing event' but still a 'light/glare' further supports a prosaic optical explanation, placing it firmly in the high bust score range.
full_text:
# DOW-UAP-D32, Mission Report, Syria, October 2024 - Page 1 Declassified by MG Richard A. Harrison USCENTCOM Chief of Staff Declassified on: 24 October 2025 SECRET//REL TO USA, FVEY # Misrep undefined-10541508 ## Narrative (SECRET//REL TO USA, FVEY) AT 0823Z, [redacted] TOOK OFF FROM OJMS VIA SLR. [redacted] PROCEEDED TO FRAGGED TASKING. AT 0649Z, [redacted] WAS 7-LINED. [redacted] ARRIVED ON-STATION AT 1102Z AND PERFORMED FMV/SIGINT COLLECTION AT 37S FV [redacted] [redacted] (SEE ISR 1). AT 1158Z, [redacted] WAS 7-LINED. [redacted] ARRIVED ON-STATION AT 1230Z AND PERFORMED FMV/SIGINT COLLECTION AT 37S FU [redacted] [redacted] (SEE ISR 2). AT 1559Z, [redacted] OBSERVED AN UNIDENTIFIED ARRIEAL PHENOMENON (SEE UAP 1). AT 2252Z, [redacted] WAS 7-LINED. [redacted] ARRIVED ON-STATION AT 2318Z AND PERFORMED FMV/SIGINT COLLECTION AT 37S FU [redacted] [redacted] (SEE ISR 3). AT 0124Z, [redacted] RETURNED TO BASE. AT 0447Z, [redacted] CONDUCTED SLR AND LANDED AT OJMS. FULL MOTION VIDEO WAS EXPLOITED BY GET. 20:24 MISSION HOURS, 14:22 FMV HOURS, 3X FMV TASKINGS PROSECUTED, 13:02 SIGINT HOURS, 3X SIGINT TASKINGS. (SECRET//REL TO USA, FVEY) ## (S/RELIDO) Mission Narrative ## Admin ### CLASSIFICATION * **Classification:** SECRET * **Associated Caveats:** REL TO USA, FVEY * **Classification Source (MS or Classification Guide ID):** MS * **Declassification Date (YYYYMMDD):** 20491020 ## OPERATION [3.5c, FOIA Exemption (b)(6)] SECRET//REL TO USA, FVEY USCENTCOM MDR 25-0100 thru 25-0103 / JS-250710-TM8S 10/28/25 001 Approved for Release to AARO # DOW-UAP-D32, Mission Report, Syria, October 2024 - Page 2 Declassified by MG Richard A. GENTEXT/UAP * **UAP Description (e.g., size, shape, color, markings, recognizable features):** MISHAPEN AND UNEVEN BALL OF WHITE LIGHT. * **Gentext (UAP Event Description):** (SECRET//REL TO USA, FVEY) FROM 1559Z-1644Z, [redacted] OBSERVED MULTIPLE GLARES OR LIGHT FROM UNKNOWN ORIGIN AT DIFFERENT ANGLES AND DIRECTIONS. AT 1559Z, 1602Z AND 1644Z, [redacted] OBSERVED 1X LIGHT/GLARE CROSSED DIRECTLY ON THE FMV CAMERA. AT 1609Z AND 1620Z, [redacted] OBSERVED A LIGHT/GLARE HALO EFFECT AT THE TOP OF [redacted] FMV FEED. AIRCREW CONSIDERED THIS NO MISSION IMPACT OR CHANGE AND UAP WAS BENIGN. cover_up_reasoning: The document contains routine redactions for personnel identifiable information (names, emails, phone numbers) and operational security details (callsigns, specific coordinates, tasking numbers), which is standard practice for declassified military reports. There is no evidence of substantial concealment of the UAP event itself, such as references to classified annexes, heavy redaction of the UAP narrative, or contradictions with public statements. The explicit 'Approved for Release to AARO' and relatively quick declassification date suggest transparency regarding the UAP aspect.
summary_zh: 本文件为一份任务报告 (MISREP)，系美国军方用于记录其行动情况的标准化报告表格。美国军事部门常利用MISREP向AARO报告不明异常现象 (UAP)。此类报告的GENTEXT，即“通用文本”部分，通常包含重要的定性、背景信息，有别于报告中其他部分的定量或数值数据。一名美国军事操作员报告观察到一个“形状不规则且不均匀的白色光球”，并描述有多个“眩光或光线”源自“未知来源”。报告员将该UAP描述为全动态视频 (FMV) 画面顶部的“光/眩光光晕效应”。本报告中所有描述性和评估性语言均反映了报告员在事件发生时的主观解读。此类描述不应被解读为任何固有物体特征或性能参数存在与否的决定性指示。
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件对UAP的详细描述与光学伪影或摄像机异常高度吻合。该观测仅限于单一传感器 (FMV)，缺乏其他传感器的佐证数据，且未报告异常运动学或行为。机组人员评估其“并非激光事件”但仍为“光/眩光”，进一步支持了平淡无奇的光学解释，使其被判定为高度可解释事件。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 该文件包含对可识别人员信息（姓名、电子邮件、电话号码）和行动安全细节（呼号、具体坐标、任务编号）的常规编辑，这对于解密军事报告而言是标准做法。没有证据表明UAP事件本身存在实质性隐瞒，例如提及机密附件、对UAP叙述的大量编辑或与公开声明的矛盾之处。明确的“批准向AARO发布”字样和相对较快的解密日期表明了UAP方面的透明度。
bust_explanations: The primary description of the UAP as 'LIGHT/GLARE FLASHED OF UNK ORIGIN FLASHED ACCROSS FMV CAMERA FEED' and 'MISHAPEN AND UNEVEN BALL OF WHITE LIGHT' strongly indicates an optical phenomenon or camera artifact, such as a lens flare or internal reflection.

Further descriptions like 'multiple glares or light from unknown origin at different angles and directions' and a 'light/glare halo effect at the top of [redacted] FMV feed' reinforce the interpretation of an optical artifact rather than a physical object.

The report notes 'NO CHANGE' in response to observer actions, explicitly states 'UAP Under Intelligent Control: NO' and 'UAP Advanced Capabilities And/Or Materials: NO', and the aircrew assessed the event as 'Benign' with 'NO MISSION IMPACT OR CHANGE', all of which are inconsistent with an anomalous physical object.
bust_explanations_zh: UAP的主要描述为“未知来源的光/眩光闪过FMV摄像机画面”和“形状不规则且不均匀的白色光球”，这强烈表明其为光学现象或摄像机伪影，例如镜头眩光或内部反射。
进一步的描述，例如“来自未知来源的多个不同角度和方向的眩光或光线”以及“[已编辑] FMV画面顶部的光/眩光光晕效应”，强化了其为光学伪影而非物理实体的解释。
报告指出，对观察员行动的反应为“无变化”，明确声明“UAP是否受智能控制：否”和“UAP是否具备先进能力和/或材料：否”，且机组人员评估该事件为“良性”，对“任务无影响或变化”，所有这些均与异常物理实体不符。
cover_up_indicators: Routine redaction of personnel names and contact information (FOIA Exemption (b)(6))
Routine redaction of operational details (e.g., aircraft callsign, tail number, specific coordinates, tasking numbers) for operational security (FOIA Exemption (b)(1))
cover_up_indicators_zh: 对人员姓名和联系信息的常规编辑（《信息自由法》豁免条款(b)(6)）
为行动安全目的对行动细节（例如，飞机呼号、尾号、具体坐标、任务编号）的常规编辑（《信息自由法》豁免条款(b)(1)）
